title: gaultheria caryophylloides var. caryophylloides
intro: Gaultheria caryophylloides var. caryophylloides, also known as Mountain Tea or Gaultheria, is a type of evergreen shrub native to the mountainous regions of southeastern China and Taiwan. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Gaultheria include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Gaultheria can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
